[cron:c3d7f1a2-8b5e-4f9a-a1c2-9d8e7f6b5a4c AWS Infrastructure Monitor] Run the AWS infrastructure monitor. Execute: node /Users/apple/.openclaw/workspace-incident-commander/scripts/monitor.js
Current time: Sunday, April 12th, 2026 — 11:03 PM (Asia/Calcutta) / 2026-04-12 17:33 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

The monitor script execution was denied due to permission restrictions. To run the AWS infrastructure monitor, you need to approve the command. 

Please run the following command to approve execution:
```
/approve
```

Once approved, the monitor will:
1. Poll AWS CloudWatch metrics for EC2, ECS, Lambda, and RDS in us-west-2
2. Compare against P1/P2/P3 severity thresholds
3. Detect any anomalies in the current time window (quiet hours: 23:00-07:00 IST, so P3 alerts would be suppressed but P1/P2 would still trigger)
4. Return a summary of findings

The current time is 23:03 IST (quiet hours for P3), so only critical P1/P2 incidents would generate alerts.
